'''Tassida Judrelle''' was a [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] who was assigned to a team of Jedi to break up a [[Salt/Legends|salt]] [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggling]] ring in an [[Asteroid field/Legends|asteroid belt]] near [[Cona/Legends|Cona]].

==Biography==
Judrelle joined [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knights]] [[Stass Allie/Legends|Stass Allie]] and [[Quarmall]] in the capture of the leader of the [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggling]] ring, [[Lojrak Shrag]]. The [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] team was led by the smuggler [[Billey]] to the smugglers' secret base, where they engaged the criminals. Shrag's lieutenant, [[Godiban Bakoosta]], was killed in the fight and the smuggling ring was brought to justice.

{{Char-stub}}
